qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Deeply nested CBOR structures exhaust the decoder call stack
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same @stablelib/cbor decode root cause: Decoder._decodeValue() recursively descends into nested arrays, maps, and tags without a depth guard, which is the condition fixed by upstream maxDepth enforcement in commit 0149e18.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: X25519-based session helpers accept low-order peer public keys and derive predictable traffic keys
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different StableLib package and root cause: this finding concerns unchecked low-order X25519 peer public keys in x25519-session/nacl helpers, not recursive CBOR container decoding without a maximum depth.

selected_finding.title: Deeply nested CBOR structures exhaust the decoder call stack

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the same vulnerable @stablelib/cbor decode path and missing depth guard described by the advisory, and the copied PoC reproduced the advisory impact by forcing decode() to throw a RangeError from deep recursive container descent.
evidence: The advisory describes recursive decoding of nested arrays, maps, and tags in @stablelib/cbor without a maximum depth, leading to RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded.
The finding maps the root cause to packages/cbor/cbor.ts decode(), _decodeValue(), _decodeArray(), _decodeMap(), and _decodeTagged(), matching the advisory-described recursive descent path.
Upstream fix commit 0149e18 adds a maxDepth option and explicit depth checks in the CBOR decoder array/map paths, confirming the matched root cause.

Judge-side PoC execution from .judge/poc_runs/cbor_stack_exhaustion/run.log logged EVOHUNT_CBOR_STACK_EXHAUSTION_POC_OK together with depth 5000, payload_length 5001, and RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied containerized reproduction built @stablelib/cbor@2.0.2 from the pinned vulnerable snapshot and then decoded a 5,001-byte CBOR payload with 5,000 nested arrays, producing EVOHUNT_CBOR_STACK_EXHAUSTION_POC_OK and RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded in the judge-side run log.
